c.description: Travel cost from city i to city j

notes: No implicit assumptions are added (the only problem in the dataset with no assumptions).
EvoCut [v1](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.11850v1) proposes three inequalities used to generate formulations `p12.b-d`.
EvoCut [v2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.11850v2) proposes five inequalities used to generate formulations `p12.e-i`.
